name: AgentOps Converter Update Runtime Parity Canary
description: Offline public canary for cross-runtime skill conversion, update/recover/goals validator portability, Codex artifact metadata, and converter/update skill contracts.

cases.title: Shared and Codex converter/update validators pass
cases.objective: Protect checked-in shared and Codex validators for converter, update, goals, and recover after Codex rewrites reduce frontmatter and convert slash skills to dollar skills.

inputs.shell: bash skills/converter/scripts/validate.sh && bash skills-codex/converter/scripts/validate.sh && bash skills/update/scripts/validate.sh && bash skills-codex/update/scripts/validate.sh && bash skills/goals/scripts/validate.sh && bash skills-codex/goals/scripts/validate.sh && bash skills/recover/scripts/validate.sh && bash skills-codex/recover/scripts/validate.sh

cases.title: Freshly converted Codex and Cursor skills validate
cases.objective: Ensure the converter emits runnable Codex validators for source skills whose checks must be portable, and still emits Cursor rules for cross-platform distribution.

inputs.shell: tmp=$(mktemp -d); trap 'rm -rf "$tmp"' EXIT; bash skills/converter/scripts/convert.sh skills/goals codex "$tmp/goals-codex" >/dev/null; bash "$tmp/goals-codex/scripts/validate.sh"; bash skills/converter/scripts/convert.sh skills/update codex "$tmp/update-codex" >/dev/null; bash "$tmp/update-codex/scripts/validate.sh"; bash skills/converter/scripts/convert.sh skills/recover codex "$tmp/recover-codex" >/dev/null; bash "$tmp/recover-codex/scripts/validate.sh"; bash skills/converter/scripts/convert.sh skills/converter cursor "$tmp/converter-cursor" >/dev/null; test -f "$tmp/converter-cursor/converter.mdc"; bash skills/converter/scripts/convert.sh skills/update test "$tmp/update-test" >/dev/null; test -f "$tmp/update-test/bundle.md"; echo conversion-portability-ok

cases.title: Codex artifact metadata remains current after validator edits
cases.objective: Prevent manual edits to checked-in Codex runtime artifacts from leaving generated_hash or parity metadata stale.

cases.title: Converter source preserves runtime rewrite and parity contracts
cases.objective: Lock converter behavior that makes shared skills portable to Codex, Cursor, and raw bundle outputs without losing references or reintroducing deprecated runtime terms.

expectations.value: Parse AgentOps skills into a universal SkillBundle format
Copy and dereference symlinks to keep output plugin-compatible.

cases.title: Update and Codex validator contracts preserve runtime-specific assumptions
cases.objective: Ensure update/recover/goals validators keep validating shared metadata when present while accepting minimal Codex frontmatter and dollar-skill references.

expectations.value: tier: session when metadata is present
tier: session when metadata is present
